svg.title: Figure 11.1 - China Open-Model Source Map
svg.desc: Source-permission map for Qwen, DeepSeek, GLM, Kimi, and source-gap lanes for unsupported China/open-model claims.
svg.text: A source-permission map, not a model ranking or national scoreboard.

g.text: Qwen2 and Qwen3 primary reports support Alibaba/Qwen model-family prose.
V3 supports MoE/efficiency prose; R1 supports RL reasoning and distillation.
GLM-4 supports multilingual/multimodal Chinese frontier placement.
Kimi k1.5 supports reinforcement-learning reasoning placement.
Qwen 3.5, Qwen 3.6, and DeepSeek V4-era systems remain support-pending under.
They may appear as targets in a gap table, not as happened releases or benchmark rows.
MiniMax, Baidu, Tencent, Xiaomi MiMo, and StepFun need official primary source rows before narrative claims.
No adoption, ranking, product, benchmark, or release claims are licensed in this pass.

svg.text: Row data: data/chapter11_china_open_model_source_map_i0105.tsv. Supported sources captured locally under provenance ledger
